sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try rotating to face left and then moving to the green frame
# Currently facing right, need to rotate 180 degrees to face left
action(['SPACE', 'SPACE'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After 2x SPACE (should be facing left):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
